Hi, I'm

View Projects

I'm Mohamed Backer Alim, an IT Infrastructure Specialist building reliable cloud systems and training the next generation.

I don't just manage servers — I architect cloud environments that stay up, stay fast, and stay secure. With AWS as my foundation, I extend into Python development for automation, React.js and FastAPI for web applications, Firebase for real-time backends, and SEO & Meta Ads for digital growth.

I'm a B.E. graduate from Anna University with CCNA and AWS Fundamentals certifications. Currently managing cloud infrastructure for a Dubai-based firm remotely while training students in Python, AI tools, and web development. I've received the Service Excellence Award for outstanding training delivery and built multiple production web platforms.

My Journey

IT Infrastructure Specialist @ Ardhiyat Al Ibdaa

Aug 2025 – Present · Dubai (Remote)

Managing AWS cloud infrastructure, monitoring system performance, ensuring high availability and security compliance. Preparing uptime and operational reports. Troubleshooting network, server, and system-level issues.

Technical Trainer & Digital Marketing Executive

May 2025 – Present · AllBee Solutions, Nagapattinam

Conducting training in Python, AI Tools, MS Office, and Web Development. Building client websites, executing SEO and digital marketing campaigns. Managing social media and deploying web applications.

Business Development Associate & HR

Dec 2024 – May 2025 · Counsel Hub (Remote)

Managed CRM systems and lead generation. Coordinated recruitment and onboarding. Maintained employee records and assisted in client relationship management.

Python Trainer @ Hope Foundation

Mar 2023 – Dec 2024

Delivered Python programming and AI tools training. Designed materials and practical exercises. Received the Service Excellence Award for outstanding training delivery.

IT Support Engineer @ Atrity Info Solutions

Sep 2022 – Feb 2023 · Chennai

Provided hardware and software technical support. Resolved IT service tickets within SLA timelines. Supported desktop, network, and application issues.

B.E. – Electronics & Communication Engineering

Anna University, Chennai (2022)

Graduated with a focus on electronics, communication systems, and embedded technologies. Built the foundation for a career in IT infrastructure and cloud computing.

Diploma in Electronics & Communication

Nagapattinam Polytechnic College (2019)

Completed diploma studies in electronics and communication engineering fundamentals.
